claim_boundary: public data can measure quote/rank changes and rolling flow proxies; it cannot identify literal front-running, provider profit, or private order flow

r2_undercut_capture.power_gate: needs >= 20 clean events with pre/post coverage
r2_undercut_capture.claim_boundary: descriptive until stacked event study, pre-trends, and placebo tests pass

r3_stale_quote_capture.power_gate: needs >= 20 clean events with pre/post coverage
r3_stale_quote_capture.claim_boundary: descriptive until stacked event study, pre-trends, and placebo tests pass

r4_quote_and_ration.status: uses the R2 event cohort once it clears the R2 power gate
r4_quote_and_ration.required_signature: post-cut flow gain plus worse rejection/capacity/price-reversal outcome
r4_quote_and_ration.current_h10_boundary: cross-sectional cheap-quote rejection is not significant
